title: All 11 last-minute winners at the World Cup

title: 60 years of hurt - England's World Cup wait in numbers
summary: England's 60-year drought without a World Cup title since 1966 is examined through key moments, players, and cultural impacts. The analysis reveals how this prolonged wait has shaped English football history.
content: England’s wait for another World Cup triumph wait told through the football, people and moments that have shaped the world since 1966.

zh.title: 60年的遗憾 - 英格兰的世界杯等待用数字讲述

title: 'A true miracle of destiny' - Messi and Yamal's incredible first meeting
summary: Lionel Messi and Lamine Yamal, two world-class footballers from different generations, share a remarkable bond that appears shaped by destiny. Their meeting at the World Cup represents a unique connection between football's past and future.

title: How coach-on-pitch Messi undid England's tactics on the fly
summary: Despite his age and predominantly walking style of play, 39-year-old Lionel Messi dismantles England's physicality-based tactical approach during the World Cup semi-final. The analysis reveals Messi's masterclass in reading and countering English strategies in real time.
content: England pride themselves on their physicality, so shouldn't it have suited them to face a 39-year-old who spends most of his time walking? Not this 39-year-old. BBC Sport football tactics correspondent Umir Irfan explores a Lionel Messi masterclass.

title: Why you should care about World Cup third-place play-off

title: Why England's loss to Argentina felt like most painful in 60 years of hurt
summary: England's 60-year tournament drought extended following a dramatic late collapse against Argentina in the World Cup semi-final. The emotional magnitude of the loss, coming from a winning position, marks one of the most painful defeats in recent memory. The defeat underscores the extended championship drought for the national team.
content: England's years of hurt will now stretch beyond 60, but the late collapse to a World Cup semi-final defeat by Argentina may be the most painful wound of all.

zh.title: 为什么英格兰对阿根廷的失利是60年来最痛苦的
zh.summary: 英格兰在与阿根廷的世界杯半决赛中经历戏剧性晚期崩盘后，其60年的锦标赛荒芜进一步延长。从领先局面中失败带来的情感冲击标志着近期最痛苦的失败之一。这次失利凸显了国家队长期的冠军荒。

title: 'Passive' and 'crumbled' - did Tuchel's defensive tactics cost England?
summary: England led 1-0 against Argentina before conceding two late goals in their World Cup semi-final defeat. Manager Thomas Tuchel's defensive tactics have drawn scrutiny for allegedly contributing to the collapse. The tactical approach remains a central point of debate following the elimination.
content: England went 1-0 up against Argentina before slumping to a heart-breaking semi-final defeat. But did boss Thomas Tuchel's "negative" tactics cost the Three Lions a place in the World Cup final?

zh.title: "消极"和"崩溃"——图赫尔的防线战术让英格兰付出代价了吗？
zh.summary: 英格兰在世界杯半决赛中以1-0领先阿根廷，但随后在比赛末期被进两球而失利。主教练托马斯·图赫尔的防线战术因涉嫌导致崩盘而受到审视。被淘汰后，这一战术方式仍然是辩论的焦点。

title: Defeat will haunt England for a long time, says Burn
summary: Defender Dan Burn expressed the lasting emotional impact of England's World Cup semi-final loss to Argentina. The intensity of the defeat suggests it will weigh heavily on the squad in the coming months. Players are processing the magnitude of missing the tournament final.
content: England defender Dan Burn says the World Cup semi-final defeat by Argentina will haunt him.

zh.title: 伯恩说失利将长期困扰英格兰
zh.summary: 后卫丹·伯恩表达了英格兰在世界杯半决赛中输给阿根廷的持久情感影响。这次失利的强度表明它将在未来数月内沉重地压在球队身上。球队成员正在处理无缘锦标赛决赛的重大打击。

title: Tuchel retains FA backing despite England defeat
summary: The Football Association maintained support for manager Thomas Tuchel despite England's World Cup semi-final exit. This signals the FA's confidence in Tuchel's continued leadership beyond the disappointing result. The backing indicates Tuchel will remain as England manager.
content: Thomas Tuchel retains the backing of the Football Association despite England failing to reach the World Cup final.

zh.title: 尽管英格兰队战败，图赫尔仍保留英足总支持
zh.summary: 英格兰足协在英格兰队世界杯半决赛出局后，仍然支持主教练托马斯·图赫尔。这表明英足总对图赫尔在失利结果之外的持续领导充满信心。这一支持表明图赫尔将继续担任英格兰队主教练。

title: Prince William tells England to 'hold heads high'
summary: The Prince of Wales offered encouragement to the England team following their World Cup semi-final loss to Argentina. He praised the team's overall performance and impact throughout the tournament. His remarks provided official support during a difficult period.
content: The Prince of Wales says England has "inspired us all" as he offers his commiserations over the loss to Argentina.

title: Football Daily
summary: A football news briefing covering England's World Cup semi-final defeat to Argentina with focus on defensive tactics. The segment examines whether tactical choices influenced the match outcome. The analysis contributes to ongoing discussion of the loss.
